allow: Bash(psql riot_data -c "DROP SCHEMA public CASCADE; CREATE SCHEMA public;")
Bash("/tmp/riot_venv/bin/python" main.py lol --name "Hide on bush" --tag KR1 --region kr --matches 5)
Bash(psql riot_data -c "SELECT queue_type, tier, rank, league_points, wins, losses FROM lol_ranked_stats;")
Bash(psql riot_data -c "SELECT match_id, game_mode, game_duration, game_start FROM lol_matches ORDER BY game_start DESC;")
Bash(psql riot_data -c "SELECT champion_name, kills, deaths, assists, win, position FROM lol_match_participants WHERE puuid = \(SELECT puuid FROM accounts LIMIT 1\) ORDER BY match_id DESC;")

Bash(psql riot_data -c "SELECT champion_name, kills, deaths, assists, win, position FROM lol_match_participants WHERE puuid = \(SELECT puuid FROM accounts WHERE game_name = 'Hide on bush'\) ORDER BY match_id DESC;")

Bash(psql riot_data -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM lol_matches; SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM lol_match_participants;")
Bash(psql riot_data -c "TRUNCATE lol_matches CASCADE; TRUNCATE lol_summoners CASCADE; TRUNCATE accounts CASCADE;")
